articles.title: Patience remains an elusive virtue for Legacy FC attack
articles.description:
“Sometimes the best help you can give is stay [up there], stay between the lines, but closer to the last line.”

The post Patience remains an elusive virtue for Legacy FC attack appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Legacy FC struggles with offensive patience, impacting their performance in local matches.
Coach emphasizes positioning, advising players to stay closer to the last line of defense.
Continued offensive issues may affect fan support and attendance at upcoming games.

articles.title: As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us?
articles.description:
Stepped-up interest in UFOs also is swirling as the United States heads back toward the moon with Wednesday's launch of NASA’s Artemis II mission.

The post As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump orders release of UFO data amid rising public interest in extraterrestrial life.
NASA's Artemis II mission is set to launch on Wednesday, aiming to return humans to the moon.
Boston residents may engage in discussions about space exploration and its implications for humanity.
